news.t: VanEck Adds Consumer Staples (TRUO) and Industrials (TRUI) to TruSector ETF Suite

holdings.infoBox: TRUO is an equity ETF with a total of 38 individual holdings. The top holdings are State Street®CnsmrStpSelSectSPDR®ETF stock at 40.02%, Walmart at 12.10%, Costco Wholesale at 10.40%, The Procter & Gamble Company at 8.69%, and The Coca-Cola Company at 8.02%.

overview.description: The VanEck Consumer Staples TruSector ETF (TRUO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in consumer staples equity. The fund is an actively managed sector fund that is a part of a suite aiming to provide the full economic composition of the consumer staples sector. TRUO was launched on Jun 2, 2026 and is issued by VanEck.

data.title: VanEck Adds Consumer Staples (TRUO) and Industrials (TRUI) to TruSector ETF Suite
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--VanEck's adds two funds to its TruSector Suite, providing full market-cap sector exposure, closer alignment with actual market composition of sectors.
